question: Aise households ke liye jo located hain aur jinka new household split number 1 ya usse zyada hai, unka state code, PSU code, aur completion status list karo, aur dhyan rakho ki sirf wahi groups include hon jisme kam se kam ek household tracking record ho.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, T1.PSU_CODE, T3.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING AS T4 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T4.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER >= 1 GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE, T1.PSU_CODE, T3.COMPLETION_STATUS HAVING COUNT(T4.HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING_ID) > 0;

question: Un households ka household ID, new household split number, state code, district code, PSU code, aur completion status identify karein jahan completion status 'Located' ho aur household ID tracking IDs 1, 2, 3, 4, ya 5 se associated ho. Inhe inhi same attributes ke basis par group karein aur state code aur district code ke hisaab se order karein.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_CODE, T2.PSU_CODE, T3.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID IN (SELECT HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING WHERE HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING_ID IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5)) AND T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_CODE, T2.PSU_CODE, T3.COMPLETION_STATUS ORDER BY T2.STATE_CODE ASC, T2.DISTRICT_CODE ASC

question: Un logon ki person_id list karo jo migrant personal records aur person core records dono mein recorded hain, specifically un households ke liye jinka split number 1 hai aur migrant ID 1 se zyada hai, ye ensure karte hue ki har person_id migrant records mein kam se kam ek baar zaroor ho, aur results ko person_id ke ascending order mein sort karo.

question: Un saare records ke state code aur district code list karo jahan household completion status 'Located' hai aur household split number zero se zyada hai, aur inhein unke respective state aur district codes ke hisaab se group karo.

question: Un saare areas ke state code aur district code list karo jahan household completion status 'Located' hai aur household split number 0 nahi hai, khaas taur par un state aur district combinations ke liye jinke paas ek se zyada household record hain, aur inhe state code ke ascending order mein arrange karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T1.STATE_CODE ASC

question: Un households ke state codes aur district codes list karo jinka completion status 'Moved out' hai aur household split number zero nahi hai, ye ensure karte hue ki har combination ke liye kam se kam ek household record exist kare, aur results ko state code ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_CODE ASC

question: Un state codes aur district codes ki list dikhao, state code ke hisaab se alphabetically order mein, jahan kam se kam ek household ka completion status 'Located' ho aur kam se kam ek household ka split number zero se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_CODE ASC

question: Un state codes aur district codes ki list dikhao, state code ke hisaab se alphabetically order mein, jahan districts mein kam se kam ek household ka completion status 'Moved out' ho aur kam se kam ek household ka new household split number zero se zyada ho.

question: Un households ki household ID aur completion status list karo jahan household split number zero se zyada hai, aur result ko household ID ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID

question: Un saare records ke liye household number aur completion status list karo jahan new household split number 1 se zyada hai, aur result ko household number ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER

question: Un saare households ki household ID aur completion status list karo jahan household split number null nahi hai aur household numbers ka count kam se kam ek hai, inhein household ID aur completion status ke basis par group karke.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER) >= 1

question: Un saare households ka household ID aur completion status list karo jahan new household split number null nahi hai, aur ensure karo ki har household kam se ko ek geography ID se associated ho.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS HAVING COUNT(T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID) >= 1

question: Un households ke liye jahan household split number zero se zyada hai, har household ID aur uska completion status list karo, saath hi household tracking records ka total count bhi dikhao, basharte us household se associated kam se kam ek tracking record ho, aur results ko household ID ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING_ID) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS HAVING COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC

Inhe household_number aur completion_status ke basis par group karo, ye ensure karte hue ki count kam se kam 0 ho, aur final result ko household_number ke hisaab se order karo.

question: Rajasthan state ke un households ke liye geography hierarchy se PSU codes list karo jinka household status 'Located' hai, aur specifically un PSU codes ko filter karo jahan household split numbers ka total sum exactly zero hai.

question: Un top 5 occupation descriptions ki list dikhao jahan deceased individuals ka number sabse zyada hai jo death ke waqt employed nahi the, aur inhe occupation description ke basis par group karo.

sql: SELECT T1.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.ACTIVITY_STATUS, COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_ID) FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID GROUP BY T1.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.ACTIVITY_STATUS HAVING COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_ID) > 0

question: Un groups ke liye activity status aur education at migration code list karo jahan migrant employment IDs ka count ek se zyada hai, aur results ko is count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.ACTIVITY_STATUS, T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT_ID) FROM FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID GROUP BY T2.ACTIVITY_STATUS, T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT_ID) DESC

question: Har activity status aur education at migration code ke liye, activity status, education at migration code aur migrant IDs ka total count dikhao, sirf un combinations ko include karna jinka count zero se zyada ho, aur result ko count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.ACTIVITY_STATUS, T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_ID) FROM FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID GROUP BY T2.ACTIVITY_STATUS, T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_ID) DESC

question: Un migrants ka marital status at migration code aur employment type list karo jinka reason for migration 'Married' bataya gaya hai.
sql: SELECT T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T4 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T5 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T5.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married';

question: Un logon ki person ID aur employment type list karo jinka migration reason ID 1 hai.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T4 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T5 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = 1;

question: Un sab records ke liye migrant ID, migration ke time ka marital status code, aur reason description list karo jahan reason description 'Married' ho, aur result ko migrant ID ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.MIGRANT_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T2 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married' ORDER BY T1.MIGRANT_ID

question: Un sab migrants ki migrant ID, migration ke time ka marital status code, aur employment type list karo jinka employment type 'Pvt job' hai, aur result ko migrant ID ke hisaab se order karo.

question: Un migrants ki marital status at migration code aur employment type list karein jinka migration reason 'Married' hai, aur results ko marital status code aur employment type ke hisaab se group karein jahan kam se kam ek record exist karta ho.
sql: SELECT T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T4 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T5 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T5.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married' GROUP BY T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1

question: Un migrants ki marital status at migration code aur employment type list karo jinka migration reason ID 1 hai, aur inhe marital status aur employment type ke basis pe group karo jahan kam se kam ek record exist karta ho.
sql: SELECT T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T4 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T5 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = 1 GROUP BY T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1

question: Un migrants ki migrant ID, migration ke time ka marital status code, aur employment type list karo jinka reason for migration 'Married' hai, in teeno attributes ke basis pe group karke aur migrant ID ke hisaab se order karke.
sql: SELECT T1.MIGRANT_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T1.MIGRANT_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID AND T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T4 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T5 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T5.MIGRANT_ID AND T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T4.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married' GROUP BY T1.MIGRANT_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE ORDER BY T1.MIGRANT_ID ASC

question: Un logon ki person ID, marital status at migration code, aur employment type list karo jo married hone ki wajah se migrate hue, lekin unka married when migrated indicator 'No' record kiya gaya hai. Inhe in teeno attributes ke basis par group karo aur person ID ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T1.MIGRANT_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_EMPLOYMENT AS T3 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID AND T2.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID = T3.EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T4 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID INNER JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T5 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T5.MIGRANT_ID AND T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T4.REASON_DESCRIPTION = 'Married' AND T1.MARRIED_WHEN_MIGRATED_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID, T1.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, T2.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID ASC

question: Top 5 migration reason descriptions aur har reason ke liye total migrant IDs ka count dikhao, specifically un migrants ke liye jinka migration ke waqt education level 'Secondary' tha, aur results ko count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION, COUNT(T2.MIGRANT_ID) FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T2.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = 'Secondary' GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(T2.MIGRANT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Un reasons ki descriptions aur migrant IDs ka total count dikhao har reason ke liye, khaas karke un migrants ke liye jinka migration ke waqt education level '8th class' tha, aur results ko count ke hisaab se descending order mein top 5 reasons ke liye sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION, COUNT(T2.MIGRANT_ID) FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T2.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = '8th class' GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(T2.MIGRANT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Migration reason ID 1 ke liye saare distinct reason descriptions dikhao.

question: Har ek migration reason description aur usse jude total migration behavior records ka count dikhao, inhein reason description ke hisaab se group aur alphabetically order karo.

question: Har reason description aur unke total migrant IDs ka count dikhao, specifically migration reason ID 1 ke liye filter karke, aur results ko reason description ke hisaab se order karo.

question: Migration ke wo reason descriptions list karo jo alphabetically ordered hon, aur jinse kam se kam ek person record associated ho.

question: Migration ke reason descriptions ki list dikhao, unhe descriptions ke basis pe group karo, jahan migration behavior records ka count ek se zyada ho, aur results ko reason description ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T2.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION HAVING COUNT(T2.MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ASC

question: Un logon ki person ID list karo jo 13 ya usse zyada age ke hain, unhe person ID ke hisaab se group karo, jahan unke household se associated household split numbers ka count zero se zyada ho, aur result ko person ID ke order mein arrange karo.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.AGE >= 13 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) > 0 ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID

question: Un migrant IDs ki list nikaalo jinki age 13 ya usse zyada hai aur jinka reason for migration 'Married' nahi tha, inhe migrant ID ke basis par group karo, ye ensure karte hue ki unka kam se kam ek migration behavior recorded ho, aur final result ko migrant ID ke ascending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.MIGRANT_ID FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T4 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T5 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.AGE >= 13 AND T5.REASON_DESCRIPTION != 'Married' GROUP BY T1.MIGRANT_ID HAVING COUNT(T4.MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.MIGRANT_ID ASC

question: Un logon ki person ID list karo jinka household split number 0 ya usse zyada hai aur migration reason description 'Married' nahi hai, ye ensure karte hue ki har person ka kam se kam ek migrant ID record ho, aur results ko person ID ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T4 ON T1.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID JOIN DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T5 ON T4.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T5.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER >= 0 AND T5.REASON_DESCRIPTION != 'Married' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.MIGRANT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID ASC

question: Un logon ke liye migration ke unique reason descriptions list karo jo 3 saal se zyada se migrate ho chuke hain aur migration ke waqt jinka marital status 'Married' tha.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T2.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 AND T3.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = 'Married' GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION

question: Un logon ke migration ke reason descriptions list karo jinhone 3 saal se pehle migrate kiya tha aur migration ke waqt unka education level 'Secondary' tha, aur ise reason description ke hisaab se group karo.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T2.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 AND T3.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = 'Secondary' GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION

question: Migration ke wo reason descriptions list karo jahan number of years since migration teen se zyada hain, specifically un reasons ke liye jo ek se zyada migrant ne cite kiye hain.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION HAVING COUNT(T2.MIGRANT_ID) > 1;

question: Un migration reason descriptions ki list nikaalo jahan number of years since migration teen se zyada ho, aur specifically wahi reasons dikhao jo ek se zyada person se associated hain.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T3 ON T2.MIGRANT_ID = T3.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION HAVING COUNT(T3.PERSON_ID) > 1;

question: Migration ke reason descriptions list karo, specifically un cases ke liye jahan years since migration teen se zyada hain aur migration reason un individuals se associated hai jo migration ke time married the, inhein reason description ke hisaab se group aur alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 AND T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID IN (SELECT T3.MIGRATION_REASON_ID FROM FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T3 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T4 ON T3.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T4.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = 'Married') GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ASC

question: Un migration ke reason descriptions ki list nikaalo, alphabetically order mein, jahan years since migration 3 se zyada ho aur migrant ka education level at the time of migration 'Secondary' code kiya gaya ho.
sql: SELECT T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION FROM DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS AS T1 JOIN FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T2 ON T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID = T2.MIGRATION_REASON_ID WHERE T2.YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION > 3 AND T1.MIGRATION_REASON_ID IN (SELECT T3.MIGRATION_REASON_ID FROM FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR AS T3 JOIN FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL AS T4 ON T3.MIGRANT_ID = T4.MIGRANT_ID WHERE T4.EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE = 'Secondary') GROUP BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY T1.REASON_DESCRIPTION ASC

question: Un migration reason IDs ki list dikhao, ascending order mein, jahan migration reason ID 1 ho ya number of years since migration 3 se zyada ho, aur inhein migration reason ID ke basis par group karo.
